description_long: This is a dark wooden entertainment cabinet with a flat rectangular top surface supporting a large flat-screen television, a white gaming console, and two game controllers. The cabinet features two glass-fronted doors on either side, each with a visible handle, and a central open shelf beneath the TV, likely for additional electronics or media storage. The lower section includes a single drawer, providing extra enclosed storage space. The wood has a polished, glossy finish, and the glass panels on the doors allow partial visibility into the cabinet's interior. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for living rooms, lounges, or recreational spaces in urban environments. The cabinet stands on four sturdy legs, slightly flared for stability and style.
description: A dark wooden entertainment cabinet with glass doors, a central open shelf, and a drawer, supporting a TV, gaming console, and controllers. It features a glossy finish and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the TV, gaming console, two controllers, glass doors, central shelf, and lower drawer.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet, the thickness of the TV, and the placement of the gaming console and controllers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the TV, console, and controllers, as well as the solid back panel of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the controllers and the side profile of the TV and cabinet.
